title: Retire obsolete Scrum and PBI historical ADRs
summary: Removed historical ADR files that only preserved old Scrum/PBI feature history and had no portable rationale value.
results: Removed obsolete project-specific ADR files from the portable ADR set.
Updated ADR maintenance rules so old feature-history ADRs are retired instead of kept indefinitely.
Updated workflow closure to record the retirement decision and outcome.
